title: Mommy app marathon QA — Batches 4/5 + Birth Plan rebuild
summary: All-day Mommy app QA sprint. Shipped Batches 4 and 5 (compliance chart, Pregnancy Timeline with Undo, vitamins in DHC grid, kick counts tap-to-type, education card week number, stretches above edu card, milestones section, isPreview fix for exercises). Built a full Birth Plan library rebuild — Standard + Natural/Crunchy checkbox model with dynamic title and Birth Preferences settings. Finalized confirm-due-date task logic. Flagged urgent Lund & Pullara container LFD alert (March 19).

Birth plan rebuilt as library model with Standard + Crunchy checkbox sections

title: All cron jobs fixed after gateway failure
summary: All 8 cron jobs were failing after Sunday Mar 8 setup. Root cause: timeoutSeconds in wrong location, channel routing wrong for Discord/Telegram. Fixed all jobs. Confirmed crypto-signal-alert healthy. March 9 journal written to #ava-journal.
decisions: timeoutSeconds lives inside payload object, not top-level
FF&E agent jobs → Discord; Ava's own ops jobs → Telegram
